heading: Why I make knives
body: I've always been happiest working with my hands. Every knife that leaves my workshop is forged, ground and finished one at a time — no two exactly alike. To me a knife isn't just a tool; it's something made to be used, handed down, and remembered. Whether it's a hunting knife for the bushveld, a blade for the kitchen, or a one-off commission, I put the same care into every piece. Tell me what you're after and I'll build it for you.
